_meta.purpose: LOOP-2 watched-source registry (DATA, not code — Roadmap 3c step 3). The regulatory watcher polls these official + trade sources on cadence; adding a source or a jurisdiction is a row edit, never a code change. `governs` scopes each source to the obligation_keys it can legitimately speak to — a page can never produce a diff for an obligation it does not govern (false-positive guard).
_meta.cadence: weekly by default; seasonal_daily runs additionally each day 1 Jan – 15 Apr (filing season).
_meta.extend: US-FED first; states fill demand-first as pure rows (jurisdiction_code US-CA, US-NY, ...).

rows.label: Trade press (Journal of Accountancy / Avalara / Tax Foundation) — early signal, always corroborate with the primary IRS source before merge
